description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular form and slightly beveled edges, featuring a large black touchscreen that dominates the front surface. The frame appears to be metallic or plastic with a white finish, and there is a circular home button located at the bottom center of the front face. On the side, two elongated buttons are visible, likely serving as volume controls or a power button. The device is slim and compact, with a flat back and minimal external detailing, suggesting a contemporary design. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, and the screen is currently blank, indicating it is powered off. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, white-framed smartphone with a large black touchscreen and minimal external features, including a circular home button and side buttons. The design is modern and functional, with a blank screen and no visible branding.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the smartphone are visible, showing the large black screen, white frame, and the circular home button at the bottom.
description_view_1: A side profile of the smartphone, highlighting its slimness and the flat, white-edged frame with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: The front and right side are visible, showing the black screen, white frame, and two elongated side buttons.
description_view_3: A direct front view, clearly displaying the large black screen, white frame, and the circular home button at the bottom center.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: No visible camera modules or lenses are present on the front or sides of the object.
attribute_button_layout: Two elongated buttons are located on the right side, likely for volume or power, and a circular home button is centered below the screen.
